rows.label: tev014001_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Robert about the crystallized
gel that surrounds NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Robert about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0001
rows.name:
That was a special impact-cushioning
gel that was used to protect the
base of the Habitat.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0002
rows.name:
Under normal circumstances, the gel
liquefies after absorbing an impact.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0003
rows.name:
But during the crash landing, the Habitat was
on a direct course for Talon Rock to the north
of here, which would have been real bad news.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0004
rows.name:
So instead, they crystallized
the gel, and by doing so, managed
to land the Habitat here.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0005
rows.name:
That's the sort of quick thinking that Captain Nagi
was famous for. If he hadn't made that snap judgment,
NLA and everyone in it would have been a goner.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0008
rows.name:
If you pass through the west gate and head northwest,
you'll reach a forested continent called Nightglow
Forest that's home to all sorts of bizarre indigens.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0009
rows.name:
Matter of fact, we're gearing up to
go survey the region right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0010
rows.name:
If you're heading in that direction yourself, make
sure you have all the items and equipment you'll
need. It's not a friendly place for the unprepared.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0011
rows.name:
And if you get there and realize you're
overmatched, there's no shame in cutting
your losses and hightailing it back to NLA.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0012
rows.name:
Anything could happen on this
planet, you know? You have to
proceed with great care.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0013
rows.name:
Completing missions is important,
but you can't accomplish
anything if you're dead.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0021
rows.name:
Crystallizing that shock-absorbing gel helped
the Habitat avoid a dangerous impact during
the crash landing, which was great.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0022
rows.name:
But as a result, the gates leading
in and out of the city were covered
in that crystallized gunk.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0023
rows.name:
Clearing it away was incredibly
difficult, to say the least.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0024
rows.name:
The stuff was hard enough to stop
the impact from NLA's crash landing,
so even Dolls can barely chip it.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0025
rows.name:
We had to devote most of our people just to clearing
it away from the gates. It's the reason we couldn't
start exploring Mira for a while after we landed.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0026
rows.name:
On our next trip to Nightglow Forest, we're planning
to do a joint exploration with some of the Orphe.
I'm actually gearing up for that right now.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0027
rows.name:
The Orphe make for strange collaborators, but
I know that their advanced technology and
familiarity with the region will prove useful.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0028
rows.name:
This will also be the first
mission for a new recruit that
I'm expecting great things from.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0029
rows.name:
We'll have to work out an exploration
plan that puts all of our individual
talents to good use.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_SEL2021
rows.name: Ask Robert about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0030
rows.name:
I think I'm going to ask Kan'tonam's
group to officially join our team.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0031
rows.name:
With their advanced technology and precise
decision- making abilities, I know they'd
be a huge asset to us during missions.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0032
rows.name:
Humanity sure has made some
valuable friends, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev014001_MSG0033
rows.name:
And since it was Elma's team that rescued the
Orphe and forged the alliance with them in the
first place, I suppose we have you to thank.[ST:wait ]
